channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Top Vitamins and Nutrients for Women's Health
Sequential vs. upfront oxaliplatin therapy for metastatic colorectal cancer may yield similar results
item.description: Sequential and upfront treatment of metastatic colorectal cancer with oxaliplatin-based therapy shows no significant difference in outcomes.

item.title: Early Signs of Breast Cancer to Watch For
Giuliana Rancic Opens Up About Career, Breast Cancer, and Staying Active
item.description: In a WebMD Real Stories feature, Giuliana Rancic, 51, discusses her red carpet career, breast cancer journey, and active lifestyle.
